Provider Facility Affiliations

Source: R/affiliations.R
affiliations.Rd

affiliations() allows the user access to data concerning providers' facility affiliations

Usage

affiliations(
  id = list(npi = NULL, pac = NULL, ccn = NULL),
  name = list(first = NULL, middle = NULL, last = NULL, suff = NULL),
  facility_type = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

id

<list> List of parameters that uniquely identify a provider, any of the following: npi, pac, ccn.

name

<list> Individual provider's name(s), any of the following: first, middle, last, suffix

facility_type

<chr> type of facility:

  • "hp" Hospital

  • "lt" Long-Term Care Hospital

  • "nh" Nursing Home

  • "irf" Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility

  • "hha" Home Health Agency

  • "snf" Skilled Nursing Facility

  • "hs" Hospice

  • "df" Dialysis Facility

...

Empty dots

Value

A tibble containing the search results.

Links

  • Physician Facility Affiliations

  • Certification Number (CCN) State Codes

Examples

if (FALSE) { # interactive()
affiliations(id = list(ccn = 670055))
}
